What did the Java code say to the C code? You've got no class.
Why do Java programmers wear glasses? Because they don't C#.
Why did the programmer's wife leave him? He didn't know how to commit.
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?'
Why did the developer break up with their keyboard? It just wasn't their type anymore.
An IPv6 packet is walking out of the house. He goes nowhere.
Why did the designer break up with their font? Because it wasn't their type.
Where do programmers like to hangout? The Foo Bar.
Which song would an exception sing? Can't catch me - Avicii
A DHCP packet walks into a bar and asks for a beer. Bartender says, "here, but I’ll need that back in an hour!"
What do you call a fashionable lawn statue with an excellent sense of rhythmn? A metro-gnome
Why do pirates not know the alphabet? They always get stuck at "C".
Did you hear about the two silk worms in a race? It ended in a tie.
When does a joke become a dad joke? When it becomes apparent.
What does a clock do when it's hungry? It goes back four seconds!
How do you find Will Smith in the snow? Look for fresh prints.
What do you get when you cross a rabbit with a water hose? Hare spray.
How do you make a hankie dance? Put a little boogie in it.
What do you call an alligator in a vest? An in-vest-igator!
What did the dog say to the two trees? Bark bark.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Opportunity. That is impossible. Opportunity doesn’t come knocking twice!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Cows go. 
 Cows go who? No, cows go moo.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 A broken pencil. 
 A broken pencil who? Never mind. It's pointless.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Little old lady. 
 Little old lady who? I didn't know you could yodel!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Hatch. 
 Hatch who? Bless you!
